推荐场景: 朋友群语音｜综合时间、地点、天气、改期
60秒任务: 「计划 Boss」：计划/改期/地点确认；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 计划｜约定｜将来｜天气｜改期｜拒绝与替代
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Let’s make a plan for tomorrow.（制定计划）
What time should we meet?（约时间）
I can come after work, but not before six.（限制）
The weather may be bad, so let’s meet indoors.（原因+调整）
Can we change the place to ___?（改地点）
I want to go somewhere near the station.（地点偏好）
Please send me the address.（请求地址）
If it rains, we can go to a cafe.（备选）
I’m running late, but I’ll be there soon.（迟到说明）
Can we move it to next week?（改期）
That time works for me.（确认）
I can’t come because I feel sick.（原因拒绝）
Let’s choose another day.（替代）
First check the weather, then decide.（顺序）
See you at the entrance.（确认地点）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: plan, weather, station, address, cafe, entrance, work, week, place, message
Verbs: meet, change, send, decide, move, choose, go, check
Adjectives: busy, free, late, near, indoors, sick
Time / Place: tomorrow, after work, before six, soon, next week, at the entrance
Chunks: make a plan, running late, works for me, choose another day, check the weather
